name: 1pc Light Filtering Linen Window Curtain Panel - Threshold™
description:
Whether you're on the hunt for the perfect window treatment or just looking for a quick style refresh, this Linen Light-Filtering Curtain Panel from Threshold™ makes the perfect choice. The 100% linen curtain panel comes in a neutral color that mixes easily with a variety of decors, and the light-filtering fabric lets just the right amount of light in while enhancing privacy. The curtain is machine-washable for easy upkeep, and the rod pocket allows you to use it with any curtain rod for versatile styling. 2% shrinkage after wash. Use two for a dressed-up look, or keep it casual as a stand-alone sheer.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
